needs_manual.description: Additional historical hunt statistics (2022 and earlier) and antelope/sheep data
needs_manual.reason: Older year files available but not downloaded to keep scope to 2024-2025 deer/elk

needs_manual.description: 2022-2023 deer and elk point/applicant reports also available in xlsx/pdf
needs_manual.reason: Available for download if historical draw trend data is needed; not downloaded to limit scope

notes: Oregon uses a preference point system for controlled hunts. Draw odds data is in the preference point draw report xlsx files (tags drawn at each point level). Applicant-by-hunt-choice files show total demand per hunt. Harvest summaries are PDF-only from mandatory hunter harvest surveys, broken down by zone, WMU, and hunt number. Population/herd composition PDFs provide 5-year trend data useful for unit-level analysis. The 2024 data covers the most recent completed season; 2025 draw data reflects the most recent application cycle. Contact ODFW.WildlifeInfo@odfw.oregon.gov for data prior to 2022.
